shop_address: Calle Dietro Il Paludo, 849, 30122 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
The Main Pavilion is definitely the centrepiece of the Biennale. Whilst the national pavilions are unique in their own, the Main Pavilion is where one discovers a coherent concept which manifests the contemporary institutional perspectives. This year’s exhibition was extremely well curated and original, focusing on women in surrealism. In this respect, it is a reflection of a wider global effort to rediscover the history of surrealism: think of the Tate Modern’s Surrealism Beyond Borders exhibition, for example.
It is large, but manageable. The information is clear, yet succinct - a thing most welcomed by the busy tourist or art lover. Having said this, one needs time. This is definitely not the place to go if you don’t have a rather crystallised idea about the history of art. That is not to say don’t go, but you must have realistic expectations about the minimum amount of time needed. If you’re not that big on contemporary, it may be worth considering visiting smaller, more manageable, and cheaper galleries.
In terms of prices, the Biennale ranks in the upper strata for the budget traveller. Tickets for adults are about €20, whilst students and seniors pay €16. Again, if you’re not that big on contemporary, it may be the best thing to skip this to enjoy Venice more.
The gift shop inside is vulgarly expensive, though, at least for the student budget. Frankly, it’s inexcusable and insulting to the Biennale. Nonetheless, one does not visit to shop, but to look.
Looking may be difficult for the average visitor. Staff are extremely kind and helpful and knowledgeable. Definitely recommend to speak to them and ask questions. The visit instantly gets much better this way, by interacting with the people who essentially run the place.

shop_address: Fondamenta S. Biagio, 783, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Panchina A. Nulli: posto da non perdere per avere la completa esperienza di Venezia, per godere il panorama e i tramonti gustando uno spritz. Ideale per un pasto frugale fuori dalla bolgia turistica, però poi portatevi via le immondizie. Attenzione a sedersi, potrebbe arrivarvi sulla camicia un improvviso schizzo di sugo, ma vale l'esperienza. Aggiungi anche tu la tua foto!

shop_address: Fondamenta S. Biagio, 783, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Ti siedi in riva al mare, con la brezza marina e la vista di Venezia davanti. Best things in life are free...

shop_address: Fondamenta S. Biagio, 783, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Ricordi di panorama vasto e immensamente bello. Le cose migliori della vita sono gratis.

shop_address: Fondamenta S. Biagio, 783, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: la panchina nulli è uno dei luoghi che preferisco.

shop_address: Fondamenta S. Biagio, 783, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Da non perdere assolutamente

shop_address: Fondamenta S. Biagio, 783, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
Calle Dario, 639, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
We stayed there for a few days and were delighted by our host Lucia who picked us up at the bus station and by the cleanliness and tasteful interior design of the place! The location is great, plenty of excellent restaurants and bars around and very close to bus/train/boat stations. It was really like a nest with view on a canal!
Shower, fridge, AC, everything was perfectly working and the host prepares many small attention that made our arrival and stay even more memorable :)

shop_address: Calle Dario, 639, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
Giardini Reali, 30124 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
I don't understand why the reviews are so bad! The service was excellent
excellent. ALSO SUPER NORMAL PRICES THIS CLOSE TO SAN MARCOM. 8 euro for an aperol apritz, 2.5 euro coffee.
The weiterwas very helpful and polite, spoke perfect english. Our sprits were excellent. The toilets were very clean. It is in a very cute park with a hidden cannal
Very good macaron also

shop_address: Giardini Reali, 30124 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Well great location. Reasonable prices considering coffee was excellent and service nice. Enjoyed the red glass tables and the view of the Grand Canal.  Historical setting.  Recommend.

shop_address: Giardini Reali, 30124 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Slow service but good pastries. Due to slow delivery, coffee was only warm and not hot. Coffee is average. Expensive to sit in, take out your food and eat outside by the lake.

shop_address: Giardini Reali, 30124 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
We ordered 2 salads, cicchetti and drinks.
Presentation was good, taste was okay. Coffee was decent. It was a bit pricey, but the location is really great. You can look at the water and you’re close to St. Mark’s square.

shop_address: Giardini Reali, 30124 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
I had the pleasure of visiting Illy Cafe in Venezia, and I can confidently say it didn’t disappoint. Just by the water, it proved to be the perfect stop before we set off on the ferry to Murano.

From the moment we walked in, the warm and inviting atmosphere welcomed us. The baristas here truly know how to craft a perfect cup of coffee. Service was slow, but the coffee wad outstanding. It completely exceeded my expectations—it was rich, aromatic, and absolutely delightful!

We indulged in some delicious pastries that paired wonderfully with our drinks, making it a lovely mini brunch experience. It was smart of us to stop here; the combination of fantastic coffee and tasty treats set a great tone for the day.

If you find yourself in Venezia near the ferry station, don’t miss out on Illy Cafe. Whether you're a coffee aficionado or just looking for a cozy spot to relax before your next adventure, this cafe is a must-visit. I can't wait to return!

shop_address: Giardini Reali, 30124 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Disaster. Don’t waste your time and money dining here. Coffee isn’t good at all and the service is terrible. The waitress is extremely rude and don’t expect she will assist you for anything. We ordered two drinks and one main to share. She didn’t give you any plate and when you asked, she gave you one plate only lol. No tape water can be provided and there’s only one stilled water in large bottle size which is approximately for 4-6ppl. If you are solo traveller, or just two persons like us, pls don’t ever come here or u will be damn disappointed.

shop_address: Giardini Reali, 30124 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: It’s a good place to rest after much walking around Venezia. Food and coffee were average for the price. A cup of Americano is Eur7.  The service is prompt from the waitress to be seated and they come and take your order quite quickly, restaurant has also clean toilets for the diners.

shop_address: Giardini Reali, 30124 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Overpriced! Croissant tasteless, coffee charged for large instead of medium & they style found a way to get out, I was in a hurry so didn't make a point.
Ordered 1 chiquetto, served 2 - 1st & last time for this short venice trip.
Wifi unavailable

shop_address: Calle Seco Marina, 985, 30122 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Great pizza spot with an extensive menu. One of our party got one of the best cheeseburgers she'd ever had. We started with the fried polenta and it was highly craveable. The pizza was excellent. Great drink selections. Fair prices. Not the kind of place you'd be drawn into from the street (if you could even find it), but if you like casual dining and extremely good pizza, put this place on your list. It's on the eastern end of the island away from the touristy hustle. Many Italians seemed to eat here. The place almost seemed closed from the front, but it had a sizeable dining room that opened up in the back to a fantastic patio with plenty of seating, shady or sunny. Obviously high-quality ingredients and everyone in the kitchen knew what they were doing. Would have eaten here more had we found it sooner.

shop_address: Calle Seco Marina, 985, 30122 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Beware of their hidden €5 cover charge per person. It’s not mentioned on their menu, website, nor does the wait-staff make this known.

We searched high and low for good pizza in Venice and finally heard about Dai Fioi where we made a reservation. When we arrived, it felt like we walked into the back of the restaurant. We ended up asking the chef if we came in the wrong door? And he pointed us to the bartender.

We were made to wait 5 min for a table despite the fact that there were numerous 2-person tables available which slightly irked us. Then we had to repeatedly wave down our server for help ordering drinks and food and to pay. He was a good server but just inattentive. The pizza options were thoughtful and well put together, but honestly the crust had no integrity and we ended up having to eat the pizza with our fork lol. The flavors were spot on, though.

As we paid the bill, I didn’t recognize “2 x coperto €5” line item. I asked and was told it was their cover charge? This bothered us. Felt like they were taking advantage of the fact that we may have been tourists / non-Italian speakers.

Whatever.

shop_address: Calle Seco Marina, 985, 30122 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Hosted us without a reservation despite the busiest of afternoons due to the proximity to the marathon finish line.  Great staff and even better food.  The very best meal we had in Venice over the past several days. Good value too.

shop_address: Calle Seco Marina, 985, 30122 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: One of the best pizzas I’ve had in Venice! The place feels authentic, not touristy, and the quality is amazing. The dough was light and perfectly cooked, and everything tasted fresh and delicious. Definitely recommend if you want a real local pizza experience in Venice.

shop_address: Calle Seco Marina, 985, 30122 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Some of the best pizza I have had! From the get-go Shakil was very attentive to us and very friendly, even getting my mum to order in Italian to everyone's amusement.
Fast service and nice pizzas. Seems like a popular place that can get a bit busy later in the evening.

shop_address: Calle Seco Marina, 985, 30122 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Service, food, and atmosphere were all top notch. We got a pizza and some pasta. Both dishes were absolutely fantastic. Along with delicious food, the staff were some of the friendliest I've encountered in Venice so far. It's a decent walk from the tourist areas of Venice, but it is well worth it.

shop_address: Calle Seco Marina, 985, 30122 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Our pizzas were amazing!
We had the Trip to Italy , un classico and the Nerano.
The wait staff were amazing and quick to serve us our pizzas! The Location is tucked away from the crowds so it was nice to slow down and enjoy our dinner!

shop_address: Calle Seco Marina, 985, 30122 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
The pizzas are awesome! Very tasty, the ingredients are super fresh, and the service was extraordinary; our waiter “Shakeel” was incredibly welcoming and nice, we asked for his suggestions and it was top notch.
Absolutely recommended.

shop_address: Campo Santa Margherita, 3054a, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: We sat down outside for drinks at night. When the waitress came over she was speaking Italian and we asked if she spoke English. She said “oh sorry I told them [the other wait staff] that you were Italian”. We ordered drinks and when they were brought over she asked if we could pay immediately. We were planning on ordering more drinks but thought maybe this what just how this place ran, even though no where else in Italy asks you to pay immediately. After we paid we felt very unwelcome there and ended up leaving. I understand that we are tourists and do not live here, but it is another thing to feel completely unwelcome. We ended up going to dolce vita a short walk away and it was GREAT. Highly recommend dolce vita, but not orange if you are English speaking.

shop_address: Campo Santa Margherita, 3054a, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Update 31.12.2024: I came back for breakfast with my girlfriend and we have been quite disappointed. The quality of the food is still so and so but the general mood and service need to be downgraded, the people were exhausted, with no passion nor protocol to follow looking improvised.
.
It is a very popular place in the evening by youngsters qnd students looking for a nice meeting place to drink spritzes and beers at a good price.  My review instead is for the morning breakfast and in particular for the eggs which are rare to find in Venice outside the hotels. The quality of the food is so and so but the view of the field and the people passing by is truly unique.

shop_address: Campo Santa Margherita, 3054a, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
edit: aggression is so confirmed! stay away from this place - man with tattoos and piercing is dangerously aggressive. Currently sat across from the bar, they have a rooftop above and someone accidentally dropped their water bottle. He came out, picked up the bottle and flung it the complete opposite direction at passerbys walking by. Know when to address your staff and cut the toxicity. What a horrible, horrible excuse of a man. Homophobic, aggressive and completely unfit to be in hospitality.

Original Review (before updating half hour later from across the street(:

tried to buy a glass at the bar - the man instantly said ‘people like you always come to the bar and I have to tell you - go sit outside’, literally shouting at me. When I was confused as to what he said and asked the other server what he was saying he shouted over ‘I told you. you sit outside or go’. By the way, I’m gay and dress a bit feminine - this is quite an older masculine and pretty aggressive guy (if I do say so). Not saying anything, but make up your mind…

When I actually decided to sit down - he said ‘sit’ like a dog. I then thought nah I’m gonna leave, and when I left he said ‘yeah go leave then go on we don’t want you here’ and started shouting at me down the street, getting other tables to laugh. Pretty humiliating lol.

I work in Venice a lot of the year, I’ve been here 7/8 times in the last year alone, and have never been treated so horribly by someone - the other worker apologised and said he was a stresshead. Literally avoid like the plague - to think I was gonna pay for a drink after that, I’m an idiot.

shop_address: Campo Santa Margherita, 3054a, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: I can’t say anything about the food but the drinks were priced reasonably and the atmosphere at night is great for those looking for a younger crowd. Visited during karaoke night by chance and had a great time. Highly recommended for those looking to meet new people

shop_address: Campo Santa Margherita, 3054a, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
For a place called Orange, clearly focused on Aperol and likely somehow sponsored by them, in a city like Venice that is super proud of its Spritz, the Spritz I got tasted too watered down.

It also took surprisingly long before our drinks got served.

It's a place that clearly targets students and so it was very popular with them. The result is an incredibly lively atmosphere.

The tables outdoor overlook the entirety of Campo Santa Margherita, one of the largest and busiest squares in Venice.

The place also seems to have a nice terrace on the upper floor.

shop_address: Campo Santa Margherita, 3054a, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Horrible service. All the bar tenders are rude. Came in at 1230 and was told they have a wait and they wont be serving anymore while people were still coming in and getting help. To simply put, avoid this place.

shop_address: Campo Santa Margherita, 3054a, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Server was rude for no reason to group of students who were very polite and spent a lot of money. Go somewhere else, don’t give them your business. Plenty of other good bars

shop_address: Campo Santa Margherita, 3054a, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: This place is amazing! Great view of the streets of Venice, rooftop seating area, affordable drinks and food, and excellent service! Also, try the ketchup!

shop_address: Cannaregio, 1509, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
The garden is absolutely gorgeous, with a beautiful purple hanging wisteria that smells divine.
The food was great, although the portion sizes were on the small side for their price.
On the night we visited, the service seemed a bit slow and chaotic, with dishes arriving in random orders, and our mains arriving 1.5 hrs after ordering. I hope this is a one-off incident.
The garden is absolutely beutiful, the fish is fresh, and the "Vino de la casa" was smooth and a perfect pairing with the fish.
9/10 recommended

shop_address: Cannaregio, 1509, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Charming terrace seating, charming and attentive owner, delicious food. Our tour spent our last evening together having dinner at this lovely restaurant. Thank you!

shop_address: Cannaregio, 1509, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Food was fine, service was fine, all just fine. The garden side was pretty cool. The service fee was not fine.

shop_address: Cannaregio, 1509, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: We found this restaurant by chance when we were wandering around the neighbourhood. It looked cute and authentic from the front and then the inside garden was beautiful. The food was delicious and well priced. For the two of us it was about €25 each including a bottle of wine to share. The only thing I marked down for was the waiters service, they weren’t too enthusiastic or welcoming but the owner was there and he was hot so maybe I should score it higher.

shop_address: Cannaregio, 1509, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: This place has an amazing garden and we would've probably enjoyed it had it not been for our server. He was really rude from the start and wouldn't even give us menus, even though we were really polite. I don't remember his name, but he made the whole experience really unpleasant. It was like he didn't want customers bothering him.

shop_address: Cannaregio, 1509, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: It wasn't a bad meal. But it came out so late that everyone waited for a long time. Everyone tried to hide their faces, including our table. The cooking time took 30-40 minutes and I lost interest. It's a tourist restaurant, but it takes too long so I don't think I can come twice. Still, the scenery and the employee didn't lose their laughter.

shop_address: Cannaregio, 1509, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Our favourite meal in Venice. (On the last night- what a way to end our weekend!)
Tasty bread service, and great wine. We had some fantastic tasting pasta dishes, as well as pork cheeks in cabbage and Venetian liver. Grerat host- would definitely recommend (will be a part of our Venice VLOG on our youtube channel when it´s out)

shop_address: Cannaregio, 1509, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
An exceptional yet honest and welcoming family run restaurant. They put their heart into their food and respect traditional recipes with excellent results. We could not believe the quality of the food for the price we paid. The octopus salad was the best we have ever tasted!

Plus the ambiance of the garden are both during the night and in the day is perfect. This place is a hidden gem.

shop_address: Via S. Rocco, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Si ascoltano gli alberi e le foglie. L’atmosfera autunnale è salva. La vista è caratteristica. Pulendo lo scivolo c’è pure modo di far giocare i bombi.

shop_address: Via S. Rocco, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: È un luogo che conserva i resti del castello di Mestre .In questo periodo dell' anno è particolarmente suggestivo  .

shop_address: Via S. Rocco, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Bel luogo di tranquillità,  ci sono anche giochi per bambini

shop_address: Via S. Rocco, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Piccolo ma interessante giardino nel cuore di Mestre. Otre ad essere un luogo di relax ci consente di vedere parte delle vecchie mura che circondavano la città e di cui, purtroppo, non è rimasto quasi nulla.
E' stato recentemente riaperto dopo il restauro di parte delle mura e della fontana.

shop_address: Via S. Rocco, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Tranquillo giardino/parco pubblico al centro di Mestre, piacevole la vicinanza dei resti delle antiche mura mestrine. Peccato sia effettivamente infestato da tante zanzare . Potrebbe essere fatto qualcosa per evitare il problema .

shop_address: Via S. Rocco, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Una piccola oasi di verde nel centro di Mestre.
Un luogo adatto per sedersi all'ombra di maestosi alberi e riprendere fiato dalla calura estiva contemplando qualche residuo delle antiche mura della città.

shop_address: Via S. Rocco, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Posto magico di Mestre. È un luogo storico della città. Ci si può sedere nelle panchine sotto alberi secolari

shop_address: Via S. Rocco, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Ieri e oggi, in occasione della festa della Madonna della salute, si è tenuta la manifestazione "il giardino ritrovato" proprio per ridare vita ai giardini e la partecipazione è stata veramente notevole‼️

shop_address: Sotoportego de Siora Bettina, 2338, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: This was one of the stops on a food tour I took and I was so enamored by the restaurant I decided to come back for my last meal in Venice. On the food tour I enjoyed the spaghetti pomodoro which was so simple yet complex I could have licked the plate clean…or scarpetta as they say in Italian. On my “last meal” visit I enjoyed the porchetta and artichokes as my antipasto and the carbonara for my first. (I’m so full I won’t have a second. I sat outside in the garden and reflected on the beauty that is Venice and the incredible time I’ve had in Italy. This was a fantastic representation of everything I’ve learned about local traditional foods…respectful, classic preparations with incredible skill and nothing fussy or Avante Garde. My food was perfectly cooked, perfectly seasoned and it’s exactly the way I wanted to spend my last day! Grazie mille per la cena perfetta!!!

shop_address: Sotoportego de Siora Bettina, 2338, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Very disappointed on all aspect. I’m not sure why the rating of this place is high really… I tried way better places in Venice for same price range. We were 3 people and ordered 3 dishes: supposedly fresh pasta: sauce has literally no taste , almost nonexistent from flavour point of view.
Pizza are similar to New York pizza…
The service is probably the worse part. The waiter aren’t really friendly. We asked for a table outside they said no as all reserved… the entire time we had lunch  the tables were empty… very disappointed

shop_address: Sotoportego de Siora Bettina, 2338, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Fried Seafood Plate was light and flavorful as was the roasted sea bream. Grilled veggies and garden salad sides were a welcome addition after a heavy carb and meat / seafood menu for the last few days.  The service we had was fantastico thanks to the time our excellent waiter took with us.  His family owned the building and we basically asked him to plan our menu. It was delicious.

shop_address: Sotoportego de Siora Bettina, 2338, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Lovely ambiance for sure! The pasta with seafood was so tasty! The squid and the branzino were not as good, I wasn't too much of a fan. Decent service. Was recommended to go to this place by a local! Its set in a garden environment which is rare for Venice.

shop_address: Sotoportego de Siora Bettina, 2338, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: I had such a wonderful experience at Nono Risoto in San Marco! The customer service was excellent—so welcoming and attentive. I ordered pasta, and it was absolutely delicious, cooked to perfection with amazing flavors. Definitely a place worth visiting if you’re in Venice! 🍝🇮🇹

shop_address: Sotoportego de Siora Bettina, 2338, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Food was awesome! Good service, the staff was friendly and quick. The food came surprisingly fast although a lot of other guests. The atmosphere was incredibly amazing and cozy! The Italian garden style made it even more charming!

shop_address: Sotoportego de Siora Bettina, 2338, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Beautiful outdoor garden area. Food was good. We had the mixed fry & mussels for appetizers! House sparkling white wine was ✨
Service was ok. You can visibly see they treat locals better. We saw that in Rome and Venice

shop_address: Sotoportego de Siora Bettina, 2338, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Great food and service, recommend a reservation if you want to sit outside. Personally found the 2016 american pop music playlist was a weird choice though and the toilets need a bit more care.

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: It was a fantastic meal, I have spent 4 weeks in italy, and this is a great one to start my 1st day in Venice. Staff members are friendly and welcoming, even make great suggestions. The creamy pistachio scallop pasta was top notch, very creamy, light yet fragrant, the black pasta with spider crab was also bursting with flavours, rich and bright with the red sauce.

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: This is the best restaurant we’ve eaten in Venice or possibly our whole entire Europe trip thus far!! Our server recommended a pistachio scallop pasta dish that was absolutely divine!!! I do not give 5 stars easily and this is the only place I’ve given it to!! My partner absolutely loves the vongole pasta. We had it before going into Venice island and we just had to have it when leaving as well. The handmade cake was absolutely lovely as well. Very lemony and moist. If you have to go to 1 restaurant in Venice, please come here!! You won’t regret it!! We will definitely be back!!

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
I had a starter grilled calamari and squid nice also bruschetta . Mains I had spaghetti with shrimp and half lobster white sauce. Also risotto zucchini and shrimp and desserts very tasty pistachio cheese cake and lemon cake. Also bottle of wine all that for €131 very tasty food and nice wine.
Good service short wait for food lovely place.

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Our first night we came across this enchanting restaurant with a garden, private outdoor area once inside the restaurant.

Unlike others, their outside seating was a wonderful canopied garden.  My children had lots of fun.

Food was excellent and the sea bass with vegetables given as a suggestion by the staff was fantastic.

Highly recommend the place as my family was very happy with our dinner experience.

Thanks

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
I recently had the pleasure of dining at Spice Garden Restaurant, and it was a truly delightful experience. The ambiance was cozy and welcoming, with soft lighting and tasteful decor that created a relaxing atmosphere.

The staff was friendly and attentive from the moment we arrived. Our food was served quickly and was absolutely delicious. I ordered the grilled chicken with mashed potatoes and a side of sautéed vegetables — everything was cooked to perfection.

The flavors were rich but not overwhelming, and the presentation of the dishes was elegant. The price was also quite reasonable considering the quality of both the food and service.

Overall, I would definitely recommend this restaurant to anyone looking for a comfortable place with great food and excellent service. I’ll surely be coming back again!

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: restaurant ribo was a highlight of our visit. The food was fresh, flavorful, and beautifully prepared. The service was warm and welcoming, and the atmosphere felt cozy and authentic. We’d go back in a heartbeat!

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: The terasse at the back of the restaurant is so nice. The greenery and the lights give a nice ambiance. My mom ate a bowl of mussels and we shared a platter of Tuna (chef recommended) and it was soooo delicious!! I totally recommend and concerning the price, its cheaper than a lot of restaurants in Venice!

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
The environment of the restaurant was giving a green glow,feel so fresh. Separately, we have to talk about Mixd cold cuts platter with cheese. The taste was mind blowing.
Staff was so friendly.

shop_address: Calle Larga dei Bari, 1223, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Amazing pizza and the dough was lovely and thin and light so didn’t feel too heavy! First day of our holiday food a success! Had the specie burrata pizza and added sausage - so tasty! Great atmosphere and whilst we were too full it appears the tiramisu is popular in here!

shop_address: Calle Larga dei Bari, 1223, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: A great find in the back streets of Venice. One of the tastiest pizzas I’ve had. They are great value and really big! It looks like a family run restaurant, the staff were very welcoming, spoke perfect English and were very helpful. Two pizzas, a salad, two glasses of wine, water and two coffees came to €55.

shop_address: Calle Larga dei Bari, 1223, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: I liked the food there, pizza with seafood was great, salad also. Service and price is good, the portions are large, you can easily share. I recommend❤️

shop_address: Calle Larga dei Bari, 1223, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: We had a great experience at this trattoria. We ordered the Pizza Diavola along with two others (whose names we can’t remember but were equally delicious), two local beers recommended by our friendly waitress, and ended the meal with a classic tiramisu. The food was tasty, the service was quick and attentive, and the atmosphere felt welcoming. Prices were average for the region and well worth it for the quality and experience. Highly recommend if you’re in Venice looking for a solid, satisfying meal.

shop_address: Calle Larga dei Bari, 1223, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
This place is a hidden gem.

No bouncers outside asking tourists to come in. Instead, just a quiet place, great air conditioning and amazing pizzas.

Both adults and kids loved the pizzas and to be honest they were pretty standard Italian pizzas but they used quality ingredients, good mozzarella and they were baked perfectly. It was how eating a pizza in Italy should be.

The service was friendly and efficient and I would love to go back here for dinner.

shop_address: Calle Larga dei Bari, 1223, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Delicious spot for pizza! Cute little spot, the patio was closed because it was too hot. Otherwise that would’ve been a cute area to sit as well!
Must try the Tedesca! It will allow you, the flavor is great! The Bufaolina was also really good !

shop_address: Calle Larga dei Bari, 1223, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Wow!  This place is great.  The pizza is very good.  Staff are friendly.  Well worth the few steps off the main path.

shop_address: Calle Larga dei Bari, 1223, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
The BEST pizza I’ve ever had. So delicious. The base wasn’t floppy and had a nice crunch. The sauce had a lot of flavour and it didn’t even need any condiments.

Staff were lovely. Gave us recommendations for exploring Venice. Would definitely go again. Miss the pizza already! Hard to find it like that in the UK.

Also SO cheap!!!

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: It was a fantastic meal, I have spent 4 weeks in italy, and this is a great one to start my 1st day in Venice. Staff members are friendly and welcoming, even make great suggestions. The creamy pistachio scallop pasta was top notch, very creamy, light yet fragrant, the black pasta with spider crab was also bursting with flavours, rich and bright with the red sauce.

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: This is the best restaurant we’ve eaten in Venice or possibly our whole entire Europe trip thus far!! Our server recommended a pistachio scallop pasta dish that was absolutely divine!!! I do not give 5 stars easily and this is the only place I’ve given it to!! My partner absolutely loves the vongole pasta. We had it before going into Venice island and we just had to have it when leaving as well. The handmade cake was absolutely lovely as well. Very lemony and moist. If you have to go to 1 restaurant in Venice, please come here!! You won’t regret it!! We will definitely be back!!

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
I had a starter grilled calamari and squid nice also bruschetta . Mains I had spaghetti with shrimp and half lobster white sauce. Also risotto zucchini and shrimp and desserts very tasty pistachio cheese cake and lemon cake. Also bottle of wine all that for €131 very tasty food and nice wine.
Good service short wait for food lovely place.

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Our first night we came across this enchanting restaurant with a garden, private outdoor area once inside the restaurant.

Unlike others, their outside seating was a wonderful canopied garden.  My children had lots of fun.

Food was excellent and the sea bass with vegetables given as a suggestion by the staff was fantastic.

Highly recommend the place as my family was very happy with our dinner experience.

Thanks

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
I recently had the pleasure of dining at Spice Garden Restaurant, and it was a truly delightful experience. The ambiance was cozy and welcoming, with soft lighting and tasteful decor that created a relaxing atmosphere.

The staff was friendly and attentive from the moment we arrived. Our food was served quickly and was absolutely delicious. I ordered the grilled chicken with mashed potatoes and a side of sautéed vegetables — everything was cooked to perfection.

The flavors were rich but not overwhelming, and the presentation of the dishes was elegant. The price was also quite reasonable considering the quality of both the food and service.

Overall, I would definitely recommend this restaurant to anyone looking for a comfortable place with great food and excellent service. I’ll surely be coming back again!

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: restaurant ribo was a highlight of our visit. The food was fresh, flavorful, and beautifully prepared. The service was warm and welcoming, and the atmosphere felt cozy and authentic. We’d go back in a heartbeat!

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: The terasse at the back of the restaurant is so nice. The greenery and the lights give a nice ambiance. My mom ate a bowl of mussels and we shared a platter of Tuna (chef recommended) and it was soooo delicious!! I totally recommend and concerning the price, its cheaper than a lot of restaurants in Venice!

shop_address: Fondamenta Minotto, 159, 30135 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
The environment of the restaurant was giving a green glow,feel so fresh. Separately, we have to talk about Mixd cold cuts platter with cheese. The taste was mind blowing.
Staff was so friendly.

shop_address: Sestiere Giudecca, 194, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Un frutteto e un giardino bellissimi, profumati e tranquilli, con panchine dove rilassarsi dal trambusto di Venezia. Ospita anche un bar e una sala espositiva, una cappella e altri elementi conventuali. Una terrazza con pergolati e panchine si affaccia sul Lido e sulle altre isole della Laguna di Venezia. Una Madonna veglia sul tramonto sulla riva meridionale della Giudecca. Un'esperienza sensoriale e terapeutica per i viaggiatori. Un privilegio assoluto.

shop_address: Sestiere Giudecca, 194, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Dopo la visita alla basilica,si scende le scale,si prende la destra e si entra in un orto giardino ricchissimo di flora. Ad accogliervi ci saranno anche 2 volontari ed un bar.poi,diverse panchine x una lettura riparati dall' uva o fronte laguna

shop_address: Sestiere Giudecca, 194, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Der Garten (halb Nutz- und halb Ziergarten) des zur Redentore-Kirche gehörigen Klosters. Eingang links neben der Kirche (Sackgasse "Calle dei Frati"). Eintritt ziemlich teuer (> € 10,-), der Garten ist aber sehr schön und für Venedig etwas Seltenes. Insbesondere die Uferpromenande (unter einer Pergola) ist sehr lauschig - Blick südwärts auf die Lagune. Kleines Café.

shop_address: Sestiere Giudecca, 194, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Un luogo magnifico, dove si respira tranquillità pace e si sta bene. Ci sono stato per alcuni lavori che ho avuto il piacere di svolgere. il lavoro dei Fratelli è infinito: dentro e fuori il Convento. Persone speciali!

shop_address: Sestiere Giudecca, 194, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Un posto incantato tra pace silenzio e religione. I frati cappuccini sono molto gentili a far da Cicerone nella visita. Molto interessante il refettorio con alle pareti appesi i dipinti dei vecchi priori del convento. Un bellissimo giardino con i "semplici", ulivi e vigneto. Dalla balaustra a sud un meraviglioso sguardo verso le isole della laguna sud. C'è una Cavana con una bellissima Caorlina...il frate mi ha detto che ha partecipato alla vogalonga di Venezia.

shop_address: Sestiere Giudecca, 194, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Un luogo incantevole, di una bellezza che consola

shop_address: Sestiere Giudecca, 194, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Situato in un luogo di favola dentro la favola (Giudecca, Venezia), questo luogo di culto dà modo di riconnerci col Divino in mezzo al trambusto di un'isola così turistica. Pur di grandi dimensioni, permette il raccoglimento, con un occhio anche all'arte. Vi sono infatti opere della scuola di Paolo Veronese di Jacopo Palma il Giovane e Francesco Bassano. Alla chiesa del Redentore è annesso il convento dei frati Cappuccini, con lo studentato teologico. Per chi ha la fortuna di accedervi, in fondo al giardino si gode una vista sulle isole della Sacca Sessola, delle Grazia e di San Clemente. È pure annessa una cavana, in cui i frati tengono una Carolina con la quale partecipano alle regate in Canal Grande.

shop_address: Sestiere Giudecca, 194, 30133 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Ein großartiger Garten! Und eine fantastische Aussicht auf die Lagune.

shop_address: Sestiere Dorsoduro, 3197, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: The Countess and her cousin gave us a lovely and intimate tour of her home.  She showed us her priceless heirlooms -- among them Venetian glass chandeliers, 16th Century tapestries, and an aristocrat's gondola sledge (chair).   Her splendid garden is the largest in Venice. The balconies offer views of the Grand Canal.   She served cake, cookies, tea, and cappuccino.  Palazzo Nani Bernado would be a lovely, romantic place to stay while in Venus.

shop_address: Sestiere Dorsoduro, 3197, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Best private garden in Venice -stunning.

shop_address: Sestiere Dorsoduro, 3197, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Friendly staff spoke english and the food was excellent!!

shop_address: Sestiere Dorsoduro, 3197, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Splendido palazzo del XVI secolo, affacciato sul Canal Grande.
Le sue sale con antichi decori e stucchi pregiati, possono essere affittate per matrimoni ed eventi privati.
Dispone di uno dei piu' grandi giardini privati di Venezia.

shop_address: Sestiere Dorsoduro, 3197, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Bellissimo!! Palazzo privato con un giardino segreto sorprendente, uno dei più belli di Venezia. Merita una visita

shop_address: Sestiere Dorsoduro, 3197, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Palazzo meraviglioso. Ci siamo stati per un evento privato.

shop_address: Sestiere Dorsoduro, 3197, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Un pezzo di storia di Venezia. Palazzo storico che si affaccia sul Canal Grande: e con questo il resto è solo secondario. Ma voglio evidenziare che anche questo palazzo, ed è un segreto di questa meravigliosa città,  nasconde aldilà delle sue invalicabili mura un tesoro nascosto...Un giardino meraviglioso ed impensabile, un vero gioiello di spazio e di natura che meraviglia qualunque viandante, veneziano o turista che sia...

shop_address: Sestiere Dorsoduro, 3197, 30123 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Waren 1 Monat in der Wohnung.Januar 2025.Sehr vieles funktionierte nicht,wie Heizung,Geschirrspühler,Wlan Kochherd nur zwei Gasflammen ,Licht in der Küche über dem Gasherd,Sauberkeit....teilweise in sehr desolaten zustand wie Badezimmerfenster Vorhänge und Hauseingang völlig von Taubendreck verschmutzt.Kein Staubsauger den man benutzen konnte..etc.Positiv ist die wundervolle Lage direkt am Canale Grande.Auch der Garten war schön wenn er dann offen war.

shop_address: Piazzale Generale Enrico Cialdini, 3, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Piccolo ma delizioso giardino pubblico inserito a margine del trafficatissimo piazzale Cialdini e dotato di comodi posti a sedere, a forma di bianchi massi. L'area è popolata da splendidi alberi di magnolia le cui caratteristiche e fioriture sono illustrate in un cartellone didattico in loco, nel quale è riportata una mappa del luogo e schede tecniche ben scritte.

shop_address: Piazzale Generale Enrico Cialdini, 3, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
Sestiere Cannaregio, 3539/A, 30121, VE, Italia
review_text: I had a delightful time staying here. Rooms were clean and in my opinion it’s well located, the water bus is a six minute walk away and while it is a 30min walk to the main tourist attractions, part of the whole attractiveness of Venice is its winding paths and bridges, which you get to see on the way. There are still very nice restaurants, cafes, and bars 5-6 minutes walking. You get to stay in a much more relaxed area of Venice, with a gorgeous garden area that I had a picnic in twice. I stayed here solo, everyone was very nice, and the view from my room was incredible.

shop_address: Sestiere Cannaregio, 3539/A, 30121, VE, Italia
review_text: We stayed at the Casa Cardinal Piazza in August 2023 and we had a really nice stay, thank you to the kind and attentive Sisters who could not have been nicer!||Easy to reach by taking the Alilaguna A-line from Marco Polo airport to Madonna dell' Orto pier, the Cardinal Piazza is just around the corner.||The garden of the house is a fabulous oasis in the summer heat and Cannaregio is a quiet sestiere, ideal for relaxation after visiting museums, with good restaurants close by ( good fish dishes from the Diana )||The house is a bit run down and in dire need of new plumbing and renovation, but clean, comfortable and in a good location.||The sisters who run the house do not speak English so brush up your Italian skills. ||They are, however, really nice and kind and ever so helpful.||And remember, curfew at 23:00, so don`t go partying or staying out all night;p||Breakfast, croissants, cake and cereal. Lunch and dinner were good Italian home-cooked meals.||Four stars for cleanliness, kind and good service and calm athmosphere.|

shop_address: Sestiere Cannaregio, 3539/A, 30121, VE, Italia
review_text:
Clean and pleasant convent with a garden (very rare for Venice). Reasonably priced.

However, taking a star off for how much they messed up my booking. When I paid the balance of the reservation upon my arrival at the convent, the extremely unpleasant receptionist somehow put it through onto the wrong account, so that the convent could not receive the money.

They then asked me to pay **again** the same amount - even though the money had already been taken out of my account once already!

Luckily I was staying there for a week, and so refused, and said that if the money was refunded to my account (which it subsequently was) I would put through the transaction again (which I then did). But a lot of aggro that went on for the entire week that I stayed there…

shop_address: Sestiere Cannaregio, 3539/A, 30121, VE, Italia
review_text: We stayed for one night at this monastery||||Location : The monastery is located close to Chiesa Madonna Dell'Orta, in a very quiet neighbourhood. The Alilaguna(orange from airport, first stop) & ACTV stop is a 4 min walk from the monastery.||||Rooms : We were offered a room that is used by the clergy , since the usual rooms were under renovation. We had nothing to complain because the room was very big, something we would have never managed at any of the other hotels or B&B. The room was clean.||||Amenities : The breakfast spread was sufficient and consisted of the usual stuff, cereals , bread , butter , jam , cheese, Panettone( could be because of Christmas) and fruits. A special mention needs to be made of the garden which is great for walks.||||The place is run by nuns who make sure that you have a comfortable time at the monastery. I would definitely recommend this place to anyone looking for a stay on the islands if one is fine to stay in a monastery.

shop_address: Sestiere Cannaregio, 3539/A, 30121, VE, Italia
review_text: This is a quite lovely place to stay. The sisters were welcoming and hospitable, the room was simple but comfortable, and the grounds were beautiful and well kept. It's in a quiet part of the city which we also appreciated. Highly recommended.

shop_address: Sestiere Cannaregio, 3539/A, 30121, VE, Italia
review_text:
A rather bad experience. 30 min walking distance from the center. If you go to stay there at eleven o'clock at night they close, you can't leave later than that or enter after.
It is shameful when you are paying for an accommodation in 2024 that they have a curfew, specially when is kept funded by dedicating to this.

shop_address: Sestiere Cannaregio, 3539/A, 30121, VE, Italia
review_text: While the monastery is very easy to find in Venice and the welcome was lovely that's where it ended.  My room had a musty odour and on the first night my room was cold so I spoke with one of the nuns who explained the heaters are on a timer.  The next night was really cold in my room, long story short the nuns waved off my concerns about being cold and my room being cold but the deal breaker was the tepid shower which the nuns tried to pass off as normal and acceptable.||I left after two nights to stay in a warm and comfortable hotel around the corner for not a lot more money.||There is a lot of work to be done at the monastery to bring the rooms up to scratch and I honestly would have thought the nuns would be more caring about my discomfort rather than shrugging shoulders and telling me it is cold outside so it is cold inside - the organisation asked me to speak with the nuns who would provide me with blankets.  Blankets aren't going to keep me warm or comfortable while sitting in the room, or make the shower have hot water.||I am really disappointed in Casa Cardinal Piazza because my experience staying in monasteries in Italy have been positive in the past, I would never stay at this monastery or suggest anyone stay at the monastery every again.

shop_address: Sestiere Cannaregio, 3539/A, 30121, VE, Italia
review_text: Yesterday we arrived in Venice and we normally stay at the madonna del orta in Venice a beautiful monastery |But on the internet we had seen this property and looked at the photos of the beautiful garden and the photos of the accomodation which at the time presented well on the internet|Yes there was a lovely welcome from the nuns , but once they had taken us to our room which was tiny for 85 euros |There was a distinct dirty musty unpleasant odour in the bathroom and we just couldn't stay here|My recommendation is that the nuns though very hospitable really need to pick up these game and make some drastic changes to bring these rooms into the 20 th century |They have a great opportunity here but there is lots of hard work to do before this |place is up to a standard where customers can be comfortably accommodated |As regular tourists travelling in Italy Rome Venice florence sicily etc we have spent most of our time staying in convents and monastery's |This convent  might be okay for back packers |You shouldn't be asking customer s to pay this price for such a low standard of accomodation. |I write this review to support all the nuns priests and staff who do a wonderful job keeping their premises to a quality and compliant standard this convent needs to follow them

shop_address: Via S. Damiano, 11, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Qualsiasi zona verde a Mestre è benvenuta. Questa però non è valorizzata a sufficienza.

shop_address: Via S. Damiano, 11, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Area verde in piazzale San Lorenzo Giustiniani

shop_address: Via S. Damiano, 11, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Discreto.poco frequentato.

shop_address: Via S. Damiano, 11, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Niente di speciale

shop_address: Via S. Damiano, 11, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
Via S. Damiano, 11, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
Via S. Damiano, 11, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
Via S. Damiano, 11, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
Str. della Rosina, 30142 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Posto e proprietarie top !!!!!

shop_address: Cannaregio, 54, 30120 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: I appreciate the open space next to the playground. However, I wish the city would allocate a bit more funding to maintain it better. Venice seems to have ample resources, yet it's disheartening that they don't invest more in greenery and parks, which contribute to the city's overall prosperity.

shop_address: Cannaregio, 54, 30120 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Tried to book to visit but no one could be bothered to respond to my request to visit . Very disappointed

shop_address: Cannaregio, 54, 30120 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Relax

shop_address: Cannaregio, 54, 30120 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Il Brolo degli Scalzi è un gioiello che si trova a pochi passi dalla stazione di Santa Lucia ed è tutt’oggi coltivato dai Frati Carmelitani. Terzo elemento di un trittico composto dalla Chiesa e dal Convento è circondato da alte mura che nei secoli l’hanno protetto dagli sguardi indiscreti. Nel giardino si trova un vigneto con più di 20 varietà recuperate da orti e giardini veneziani per ritrovare le antiche viti della Serenissima. Consiglio vivamente di farsi accompagnare da una guida che vi farà anche scoprire la magnificenza della Chiesa degli Scalzi.

shop_address: Cannaregio, 54, 30120 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Ho prenotato una visita alla chiesa di Santa Maria di Nazareth e al giardino mistico. La guida è stata molto esaustiva è gentile: è stato un piacere passare due ore circa in sua compagnia. Consiglio la prenotazione sicuramente perché è l'unico modo per poter accedere al giardino inoltre è molto interessante per poter approfondire la visita della chiesa, ma anche per chi è interessato alla botanica in generale.

shop_address: Cannaregio, 54, 30120 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Un momento di pace!
Quando i rumori si fanno opprimenti, riuscire a ritrovare la tranquillità è essenziale!
Questo giardino è un momento di pace che permette di rigenerarsi e riprendere fiato. si nota le cure amorevoli e la dedizione di chi ogni giorno si dedica non solo alla cura del giardino, ma anche all'accoglienza delle persone che spinte dalla curiosità, varcano le soglie di questa piccola oasi. E' un percorso spirituale ma anche solo umano . Da vedere assolutamente.
Comodissimi gli orari, che ogni 40 minuti circa, introducono il visitatore e il curioso ad immergersi in un breve cammino nel verde e nel silenzio.

shop_address: Cannaregio, 54, 30120 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Da tanto volevo visitarlo. Uscendo dalla stazione ho visto aperto e ho scoperto che in quella giornata facevano visite guidate gratuite. Visita esaustiva con spiegazione della struttura del giardino e delle piante profumatissime. Il giardino non è solo da guardare ma anche da odorare!  Qui viene coltivata la melissa con la quale si fa la famosa acqua di melissa  che ancora oggi si può trovare nella stanza attigua alla  stupenda chiesa degli scalzi.Ottimo anche il rinfresco offerto ai visitatori. Esperienza non pianificata e per questo ancora più apprezzata

shop_address: Cannaregio, 54, 30120 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Segundo o site "O JARDIM MÍSTICO
REABE PARA VISITAS NA PRIMAVERA", e é necessário agendar previamente. O endereço indicado no mapa é privado, provavelmente há outra forma de ingressar quando é agendada a visita.

shop_address: Campiello Priuli, 4011, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: This is an ancient building with all the comforts of a 4-5 stars. Service is decent and breakfast satisfying. The best rooms are on the second floor so book in advance. The location is great, just 15 minutes walk to Rialto bridge and 20 minutes to San Marco square.  The garden is wonderful and a true piece of history. If Venice is your destination, try this hotel.

shop_address: Campiello Priuli, 4011, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Wonderful stay at the Palazzo Abadessa
I stayed at the Palazzo Abadessa Hotel with my children, and we had a fantastic time. My children were especially happy – the entire staff was incredibly friendly, helpful, and polite. They made us feel truly welcome.
The hotel's location is also perfect: very central and ideal for exploring the city.
We would return anytime and highly recommend the hotel!

shop_address: Campiello Priuli, 4011, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
I know this is very subjective and many would not agree, but this is how I imagine a quality hotel. It had friendliest staff as we were there and the historical palace is just magical. You can touch history here... Wait until you discover the garden!
Yes, the green and very quiet garden was the suprise of the year that I did not expect in Venice.
The hotel is away from the busy street yet you can reach Rialto quickly. Breakfast was great. Loved the interior!

shop_address: Campiello Priuli, 4011, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Charming old hotel with lots of “typical Italian” decorations. Great if you want to really go for that look aesthetically! The manager was literally so wonderful that it made me leave this review. Would recommend based on his personality alone.

shop_address: Campiello Priuli, 4011, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
Be careful with this place. They will offer you “free upgrade” at check in then try to charge you next day. Saw it happen to two others arguing at check in then tried to sneak it on us by saying it would be easier to carry bags there (they didn’t help us carry bags up the stairs in an attempt to sell)

Rooms are tiny and AC / Wifi doesn’t work. Breakfast is gross.

Staff tried to collect city tax three times even though I showed I paid.

Better options all around for the price.

shop_address: Campiello Priuli, 4011, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: I had the most enchanting and magical stay at Hotel Palazzo Abadessa. ||When I arrived at the palazzo, I was wondering if I really deserved this. It was a beautiful and real palazzo dating back to 16 th century.   I chose this hotel, since I wanted to experience the real culture and history of Venetian Palazzo. It turned out be more than I had expected.||It felt like staying at your Venetian dream home away from your average home. One of staff said to me when I arrived. "It is your home, "||It has a beautiful garden which is very rare in Venice. And the first floor has lots of Master peace renaissance paintings of Tintoretto and old-world furniture.  I was very lucky to have a very spacious room with old glamour and charm of Venetian decor. It was very specious with a canal view. I am sure I was upgrade due to my gold member status of reward program. However, they did not even mention it. ||The location is perfect with easy walking distance to all the major attractions such as Doger's palace, St Marco Basilica /piazza and Rialto Bridge.   However, it offers a quiet sanctuary from maddening tourist crowd.||What makes this Palazzo very special is the warm hospitality and kindness of the host and staff. In fact, this Palazzo had a real human soul and kind spirit.||The host Jasmine, she was always available to help guests and make your stay better more pleasant, she even told me, if you get lost, call us, we will find you and get you home.  "We will go there together tomorrow to get it all sorted" when I was looking for mobile phone sim provider.  Jasmine has such a genuine humility and kindness. ||I cannot thank staff especially Navid enough, he was my first point of contact. He was the one of the most caring men I 'ever met. Before my visit to Venice, I had a very awful experience of having my phone stolen in Barcelona.  He genuinely wanted to help me to recover from my distress. He was compassionate, kind and helpful trying to make things better for me the whole time. Other staff Lucas and Juan are also nice and kind.||I want to return my Venetian dream home Palazzo. I miss the heart and soul of the real Palazzo Abbadessa.

shop_address: Campiello Priuli, 4011, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: This hotel is fabulous. We spent 4 days here and loved every minute. I cannot praise the staff and owners enough. All the staff were very friendly, knowledgable and willing to help. I was poorly during our stay ans spent 2 days confined to the hotel. The staff brought me lemon and honey drinks and were very kind. Thank God for the garden and good weather.|Our room on the ground floor was lovely and we both felt very comfortable, Simone, the owner, said she wanted us to feel this gorgeous 500 year old palace was our home!  I wish,

shop_address: Campiello Priuli, 4011, 30121 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
This was our first trip to Venice made even more wonderful by our stay at Palazzo Abadessa.  I could cite the superb location, a haven of peace and tranquility, yet only 100m from the main thoroughfare and Grand Canal; the elegant tasteful interior, lobby and rooms; the serene peaceful garden where we enjoyed breakfast and drinks throughout the day and evening; the generous and tasty breakfasts; but more important than all this, all true nevertheless, was the unwavering attentiveness and politeness of the staff. I simply cannot fault their wonderful welcome and care. Thank you to all.
Stuart & Sue

shop_name: Arte nel giardino di Davide Polesel
shop_address: Via Pialoi, 102/b, 30020 Marcon VE, Italia
review_text: top ❤️

shop_name: Arte nel giardino di Davide Polesel
shop_address: Via Pialoi, 102/b, 30020 Marcon VE, Italia
review_text:
Ottimo lavoro!

Davide e la sua collaboratrice hanno effettuato un lavoro di pulizia di un'area inutilizzata ed incolta.
Hanno fissato due date per gli interventi.
Causa maltempo hanno riprogrammato il lavoro svolgendolo addirittura in anticipo rispetto ai tempi previsti, rispettando pienamente gli orari e gli impegni presi!
Il lavoro è stato svolto a regola d'arte.

Lungomare Dante Alighieri, 21, 30013 Cavallino-Treporti VE, Italia
review_text:
Booked an apartment to visit venice. The 5 minute walk to the next ferry and 30 minutes on the direct ferry was very comfortable.

But the service of the place itself was terrible. Over the few days we stayed, they added random new costs without prior notice at the booking. The facilities were very basic and you need to bring the necessities like toilet paper, soap and bedsheets if you dont want to be charged extra.

Additionally, the mattresses were extremely uncomfortable.

Overall, it fulfilled its purpose of doing some day trips to venice but if you want a comfortable stay, we would recommend to search for another place.

shop_address: Lungomare Dante Alighieri, 21, 30013 Cavallino-Treporti VE, Italia
review_text: Beautiful apartment and friendly owner. A great base for exploring Venice, very close to the port. The walk to the beautiful beach was a real pleasure. I highly recommend it!

shop_address: Lungomare Dante Alighieri, 21, 30013 Cavallino-Treporti VE, Italia
review_text:
We had a great family stay at Giardino al Mare (7 people in total in 2 x Apartments).

Perfect location to explore the islands of Venice, Murano and our favourite Burano.

A 5min walk will bring you to the Jettys to  catch the ferry to the islands.

Big garden, nice surrounding to enjoy nature in a tranquil setting.

Marisa organised bikes for our group which was a real highlight as the area is so bike friendly. Beautiful beach nearby.

We highly recommend Marisa accommodation and will definitely return on our next visit to the area.

Many thanks to Marisa & Mauro.

review_text:
Die Unterkunft war in Ordnung.  Das Bett war steinhart und es war eiskalt drinnen.  Die Heizkörper waren zwar warm, jedoch reichte die Heizleistung nicht aus um die Unterkunft warm zu machen. Wir verstehen dass es draußen kalt war, aber wenn man etwas im Februar vermietet, sollte man auch dafür sorgen, dass die Wohnung warm ist.
Die Bettwäsche und Handtücher sind nicht im Preis (8 Euro/ Tag).
Die Vermieterin war sehr nett, hat gut deutsch gesprochen und die Außenanlage war sehr schön und gepflegt.

review_text: Wir haben spontan angefragt und sehr rasch Antwort bekommen. Haben das Dachzimmer gebucht, ohne Küche, aber mit Bad.  Zimmer und Bad sehr sauber. Alle sehr Freundlich. Fähre gleich um die Ecke.  Alles für einen spontan Kurzurlaub top.

shop_address: Lungomare Dante Alighieri, 21, 30013 Cavallino-Treporti VE, Italia
review_text:
Ubytování bylo na příjemném místě, na pláž se dá na půjčeném kole dostat do 6 minut, k trajektu je to ještě blíž. Vybavení je jednoduché, ale v pořádku. S majitelkou se dalo bez problému domluvit, angličtina i němčina není problém.

Za co nicméně strhávám hvězdy je za skryté poplatky, teprve den před ubytováním nám majitelka napsala, že si nad rámec zaplacené ceny bude účtovat poplatek za ložní prádlo a na místě jsme potom ještě zjistili, že klimatizace nemá ovladač, ten nám dala až po vyžádání a opět za poplatek za každou noc.

Vůbec by mi nevadilo rovnou zaplatit víc, ale tenhle přístup mi přišel odporný, skoro jsem čekal, jestli nám na konci pobytu naúčtuje stočenou vodu a opotřebení brzd na kolech... Nicméně kromě toho bylo ubytování pěkné a můžu ho doporučit.

review_text:
Dopo anni d'abbandono era stata minacciata la vendita; fortunatamente alcuni studenti volenterosi lo avevano occupato, trasformandolo in un luogo di aggregazione e questo ha convinto l'Università ad investirci. Ora presenta uno dei prati pubblici più grandi di Venezia, anche se purtroppo molte piante malate sono state abbattute.
Da non perdere, la vera di pozzo coi leoni e gli stemmi dei Barbarigo.
Un'accortezza: evitare schiamazzi, poiché sul giardino si affacciano gli studi dei ricercatori di Ca’ Bembo.

[AGGIORNAMENTO GENNAIO 2020]
A meno di tre mesi dall'inaugurazione, il giardino è ridotto ad una palude. Sebbene non piova da almeno dieci giorni, è rimasta una grossa pozza di acqua stagnante al centro del prato che sta facendo marcire l'erba.
Un luogo meraviglioso su cui è stato fatto un lavoro frettoloso e quindi approssimativo.

The prices are normal, not too expensive for what it offers.
All the staff are smiling and helpful, I recommend it ....

shop_address: Via Palazzo, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text:
🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 A Truly Exceptional Dining Experience at La Torre Osteria

From the moment we arrived at La Torre Osteria, everything about the experience was flawless. The food was absolutely amazing – beautifully presented, bursting with flavor, and clearly prepared with care and creativity. Every dish exceeded expectations.

The service was equally outstanding – warm, attentive, and genuinely welcoming without ever feeling intrusive. The staff made us feel right at home and added to the charm of the evening.

The ambiance is wonderful – cozy yet elegant, with a relaxed, inviting atmosphere that makes you want to linger just a bit longer.

La Torre Osteria is one of those rare gems that gets everything right. I cannot recommend it highly enough – a perfect spot for a romantic evening, a family meal, or a special celebration. We’ll absolutely be returning!

shop_address: Via Palazzo, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: The Perfect restaurant. The food was impeccable, the atmosphere was lively and the service was great, checking in, being friendly and making jokes- i kid you not some of the best service i’ve experienced in a long time. This is THE spot you want to visit especially if you like steak. You get more than what you pay for and excellent quality. Absolutely perfect. Will visit again.

review_text: The food was wonderful and the service outstanding. We all had pasta and all dishes were fantastic.  For dessert we had the Amaretto Tiramisu and the Brownie, both were delicious. Definitely a must go if you are in Venice-Mestre.

review_text: 10/10 hands down the best meal we’ve had in Italy! It was so good that we came back a second time! I highly recommend their pasta dishes 🤤 and their staff are absolutely lovely. If we ever end up in Mestre/Venice again we will 100% be coming back here

shop_address: Via Palazzo, 30174 Venezia VE, Italia
review_text: Treated rudely by the staff at another restaurant we found an open table here at La Torre. The waiter was extremely friendly, warm, polite. The waiter recommended wine after describing what I was looking to drink, telling me trust him and the wine was better than expected, bravo.
